summary: Location Risk Intelligence - 5 UI Enhancements - ALL VERIFIED. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED. Frontend: All 5 UI enhancements working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Map sometimes stuck on 'Loading location intelligence...' until refresh button clicked
integration_issues.workaround: Click refresh button to load data

test_results.backend_10_tests: ALL PASS - Device risk_score/risk_level (1), Incident clustering data (1), Heatmap severity (1), Breakdown 5 components (2), Risk zones (1), Geofences (1), Active alerts (1), Map center (1), Auth (1)
test_results.frontend: ALL PASS - 5 layer toggles (Risk Zones, Devices, Incidents, Geofences, Heatmap), Stats bar with 'At Risk' badge, Map legend with Device Status section, Heatmap gradient layer, Device markers with risk-based colors (green/yellow/red), Incident cluster markers with count numbers, Risk Breakdown horizontal bars with 5 components

feature_1_risk_breakdown.backend: GET /api/operator/location-risk?lat=12.97&lng=77.59 returns breakdown object with incident_density, time_of_day, zone_proximity, isolation, history
feature_1_risk_breakdown.frontend: RiskBreakdownBars component shows horizontal bars with 5 risk components in probe panel after right-click

feature_2_incident_clustering.backend: GET /api/operator/location-risk/heatmap returns incidents array with lat, lng, type, severity
feature_2_incident_clustering.frontend: MarkerClusterGroup displays incident clusters with count numbers (17 cluster icons visible)

feature_3_heatmap_layer.backend: Incidents include severity field for heat intensity calculation
feature_3_heatmap_layer.frontend: HeatLayer component with leaflet.heat shows gradient overlay, toggle works (canvas appears/disappears)

feature_4_device_risk_indicators.backend: Each device in heatmap response has risk_score (0-10) and risk_level (Low/Moderate/High/Critical)
feature_4_device_risk_indicators.frontend: Device markers show risk-based colors (green=Safe, yellow=Moderate, red=High), 9 custom device markers visible

feature_5_alert_animation.backend: Devices with risk_score >= 5 flagged as High/Critical
feature_5_alert_animation.frontend: CSS @keyframes devpulse animation applied to high-risk devices (pulse ring visible on markers)

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/location-risk/heatmap: 200 OK - devices with risk_score/risk_level, incidents, risk_zones, geofences, active_alerts, center
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/location-risk?lat=12.9: 200 OK - breakdown object with 5 components, safety_score, risk_level, factors

critical_code_review_comments: Per-device risk scoring computed in get_risk_heatmap_data() by calling evaluate_location_risk() for each device - may cause slower API response with many devices
MarkerClusterGroup from react-leaflet-cluster properly clusters incidents with custom cluster icons
HeatLayer uses leaflet.heat with gradient colors (green→yellow→orange→red) based on incident severity
Device markers use L.divIcon with dynamic background color based on risk_score
Pulse animation CSS properly injected via PULSE_CSS constant
Map legend includes both Risk Level and Device Status sections
seed_data_creation: Using pre-seeded data: 9 devices with locations, 80 incidents, 10 risk zones, 2 geofences, 5 active alerts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location Risk UI enhancements complete. Key components: react-leaflet-cluster for incident clustering, leaflet.heat for heatmap layer, deviceIcon() function for risk-colored markers with pulse animation, RiskBreakdownBars for probe panel visualization. All 5 layer toggles work. Stats bar shows device count and 'At Risk' badge for high-risk devices.
